title: pouteria atlantica
intro: Pouteria atlantica, also known as the White Laurophora or Babussa tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. The bark and seeds of Pouteria atlantica have been traditionally used in folk medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pouteria atlantica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide protection against certain infections. Pouteria atlantica can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its seeds can be made into a powder for oral consumption or used in topical applications.
